TextRun.Text: cause our loss of sth. easy

RichText.Text: 1. further cause our loss of sth. easy to be ignored a sharp loss in special memory be lost in deep thought (lose-lost-lost) 2. lead to discomfort/comfort comfortable uncomfortable 3. regarding stress 4. ability to form new connections 5. balance it with intentional discomfort 6. think of ...as... 7. write with pen wash dishes by hand 8. weaken our thinking skills 9. reawaken the resilience 10. the growing popularity of ... 11. the failure of... 12. the rise in mental problems linked to digital dependency

TextRun.Text: 导致我们失去某些容易

RichText.Text: 1. 进一步导致我们失去某些容易 被忽视的东西 特殊记忆的急剧丧失 陷入沉思 2. 导致不适 / 舒适 舒适的 不舒服的 3. 关于压力 4. 形成新联系的能力 5. 用有意识的不适来平衡它 6. 把……看作…… 7. 用钢笔写字 用手洗碗 8. 削弱我们的思维能力 9. 重新唤醒韧性 10. ……越来越流行 11. ……的失败 12. 与数字依赖相关的心理问题的增加
